page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server instance belonging to the ecs.gn7i family. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 30.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU providing 24 GB of VRAM. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, meaning storage must be attached externally. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average-tier results for standard CPU and memory operations, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1580.0 and a multi-core score of 5901.0. However, the hardware excels in GPU-accelerated tasks. Large language model inference benchmarks place this instance in the top tier for smaller models, delivering 9665.83 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 135M model and 2504.89 tokens per second on a 7B model. Memory bandwidth is measured at 426.96 GB/sec for cached small-block reads, while large-block uncached reads reach 57.43 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn7i-c8g1.2xlarge offers a balanced entry point for GPU compute workloads, avoiding the higher resource density and cost of multi-GPU configurations. The lack of local storage requires users to factor in external storage performance and costs. This instance is highly suited for workloads such as low-to-medium scale LLM inference, AI model deployment, image processing, ray tracing, and general GPU-accelerated compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.9 GHz, 30.0 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps but does not include local storage. Benchmark results show average CPU performance, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 5901.0, but top-tier performance in LLM inference, achieving 2504.89 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 7B model. This profile makes the instance highly cost-efficient for deploying small-to-medium AI models, ray tracing, and image processing without the overhead of larger multi-GPU systems.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 30 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB VRAM, optimized for AI inference and ray tracing.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and an NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU for efficient AI inference and graphics workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs and 30 GB of system memory
NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM
Top-tier performance for small-to-medium LLM inference workloads
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage included, requiring external storage attachment
Suited for AI model deployment, ray tracing, and image processing
